mnemonics.title: AES Rounds: TwelvE FourteEn TEN
mnemonics.content:
AES-128 = **10** rounds
AES-192 = **12** rounds
AES-256 = **14** rounds
Remember: key size goes up by 64, rounds go up by 2

mnemonics.title: FAST - Symmetric vs Asymmetric
mnemonics.content:
**F**aster encryption (symmetric wins)
**A**symmetric for signatures (asymmetric wins)
**S**hared key problem (symmetric weakness)
**T**wo keys vs one (asymmetric has two)

mnemonics.title: Blockchain Symmetric Uses: WEND
mnemonics.content:
**W**allet encryption (AES-256)
**E**ncrypted node communication (TLS)
**N**ode-to-node secure channels
**D**erivation of keys from passwords (KDF)

mnemonics.title: ECB is BAD - CBC is BETTER
mnemonics.content:
**ECB**: Each Block Copies patterns (insecure)
**CBC**: Chains Blocks with Chaining (secure, uses IV)
**CTR**: Counter Turns into stream (parallelizable)
